textByHashes.7bfbd21ca0df9c93e4477d110c249966b21d9f9a: Good day to you too, Blockhead.
textByHashes.af7defff9494d1fa3a7bcc029e32d1f8f5b7c426: Now what do you want from the old hag of Pollnivneach? Hexes? Curses? Eternal youth? Poisons? You name it, I can brew it.
textByHashes.e51e4cf193db8d808e449f360b5770e8bc492935: I'm busy brewing potions, so if you disturb me again without reason, I will turn you into a frog!
